name: talo-collision-checker
description: Collision checker for Talo — the second lexicon gate (after the phonotactic linter). Rejects homophones, near-homophones under the weak stop contrast (b/p, d/t, g/k), clashes with reserved grammatical words, and cross-language obscenities. See docs/0000 §4 and docs/0001 §2.1/§8.
